task_completion.description: The original 'annual_yield' feed has been renamed to 'annual_yield_archive'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Emoncms Feeds page, there is a feed named 'annual_yield_archive'.

task_completion.description: A new feed named 'annual_yield' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Emoncms Feeds page, a feed named 'annual_yield' is visible alongside the archive feed.

task_completion.description: The new 'annual_yield' feed is configured with the PHPFina engine and a 10s interval.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Feeds page, the row for the new 'annual_yield' feed shows 'PHPFina' in the Engine column and '10s' in the Interval column.

task_completion.description: The 'solar_yield' input is configured to log to the new 'annual_yield' feed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Input processing page for 'solar_yield' (or in the Inputs list), there is a 'Log to feed' process pointing to the new 'annual_yield' feed, not the archive.

task_completion.description: The new 'annual_yield' feed is receiving new data while the archive feed is not.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Feeds page, the 'Updated' column for 'annual_yield' shows recent activity (e.g., seconds ago) and changing values, while 'annual_yield_archive' shows older activity and static historical values.

integrity.description: The agent used the Emoncms web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Emoncms web interface (Feeds, Inputs pages) being navigated and interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API calls via curl.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the system rather than just editing the HTML via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools are not open, and changes persist across page loads or navigation between Inputs and Feeds pages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation tools to alter feed names or configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Emoncms UI, not a database client like phpMyAdmin or terminal SQL commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original feed to be renamed is 'annual_yield'. The new feed must be named 'annual_yield', use the PHPFina engine (Engine ID 5), and have a 10-second interval. The input to be updated is 'solar_yield'. The VLM should verify these exact names and configurations in the Emoncms web interface.
